    SimpleNumbering
    A simpler Numbering implementation for legacy support.
    Classes in org.jscience.core.util that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Numbering
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Numbering
    Represents a hierarchical numbering (e.g., "1.0.1", "Article 42.1").
    Methods in org.jscience.core.util that return Numbering
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Numbering
    Numbering.addMinor()
    Adds a minor version (e.g., 1.2 -> 1.2.0).
    Numbering
    Numbering.getNext()
    Returns the next numbering at the current depth (e.g., 1.2 -> 1.3).
    static Numbering
    Numbering.parse(String s)
    Parses a dot-separated string into a Numbering.
